review.notes: The draft is accurate. No clear standalone headline is visible in the OCR (the article begins mid-narrative with "HUMBOLDT -"), so the AI-synthesized headline is a reasonable editorial summary rather than a verbatim OCR headline. All key facts check out: 4-3 OT win, 2-1 series lead, Tony Bobbitt's OT goal at 1:04, Romeo's 36 saves, Matt Hervey and other Sockeyes quotes, and the Curtis Chamberlin detail. Minor OCR garbling in the lower columns does not affect the accuracy of the draft. Note: the Abbott Cup was the Western junior-A final (vs. Alberta champion), not the national final — the opponent here is Humboldt Broncos (Saskatchewan champion), which would actually make this a Centennial Cup context, not Abbott Cup. However, the OCR itself explicitly calls it the "Abbott Cup series," so the draft correctly reflects the source text.
